slides.image_prompt:
Slide 1/7 role=hook. Thai copy: ประชุมเสร็จ ให้ AI แปลงโน้ตเป็นงานจริงทันที
workflow • Make. Visual direction: bold cover slide, strong Thai headline based on the real source idea, cute robot mascot, practical AI design/workflow icons, small GenLabs logo in a corner. Hand-drawn Thai sketchnote infographic style. Balanced 50% useful Thai text and 50% graphics: cute robots, icons, arrows, marker lines, rounded cards, section badges, checkmarks, simple diagrams. Mobile-readable mini-lesson: one core idea per slide, enough detail to teach a useful technique, no dense paragraphs. Render the Thai copy exactly as provided; do not substitute similar-looking Thai words or alter spelling. Thai spelling QA: use กฎ not กฏ, use ชัดขึ้น without an extra space, use โทนแบรนด์ not ทงแบรนด์, keep ด้วย AI ใน 5 ขั้นตอน together in that order, and keep product/tool names exactly as written. Include a small GenLabs logo/brand mark in a corner or footer, never oversized. Do not include analytics, learning-loop elements, or fake dashboards.

ประชุมเสร็จ ให้ AI แปลงโน้ตเป็นงานจริงทันที

3) ให้ AI เขียน follow-up ส่งใน Slack หรือ LINE
4) ตรวจชื่อคน วันครบกำหนด และสิ่งที่ตัดสินใจ. Visual direction: four-step teaching checklist, numbered icon cards, arrows showing workflow path, enough Thai text to teach the technique. clean_brief.clean_headline: Boosting Business Productivity with Custom ChatGPT Workflows Poll the People ChatGPT Will Change How You Run Your Business!
clean_brief.clean_summary: Boosting Business Productivity with Custom ChatGPT Workflows Poll the People ChatGPT Will Change How You Run Your Business! Here's How to Automate Smarter! STOP Wasting Time on Manual Tasks! Transcript: today we're diving into how custom chat GPT workflows can uh revolutionize business operations let's get started that's fantastic so what's the main idea behind using chat GPT for streamlining business Ops well most businesses think automation is just about replacing human effort but it's actually about doing things smarter not just faster right so you're saying custom chat GPT workflows can make operations more efficient and intelligent exactly according to Accenture AI Technologies like chat GPT can boost productivity by up to 40% wow yet many companies struggle to unlock its full potential because they Overlook tailoring these tools to their unique needs that's interesting how can businesses move Beyond generic automation to create workflows that truly align with their goals it's about identifying bottlenecks in their processes and designing custom solutions by integrating chat GPT they can automate routine tasks like report generation ensuring faster decisions with better data yeah but isn't there a challenge in integrating chat GPT with existing systems well integration isn't just about apis it's about creating Synergy tools like zapia can help chat GPT interact with crms and analytics platforms making operations smarter and more cohesive I see can you give an example of a company that successfully implemented this sure a retail company used chat GPT to automate product descriptions achieving a 40% reduction in content creation time their marketing team for strategic work but wait isn't there a risk that overreliance on automation could you know replace human roles actually automation with chat GPT complements human roles by handling repetitive tasks it empowers teams to focus on creativity and Innovation rather than mundane work that makes sense what what about data security and compliance how do businesses ensure they're not compromising sensitive information data security is crucial businesses should use robust encryption Implement strict access controls and regularly update systems to address vulnerabilities compliance with regulations like gdpr is essential definitely important so how do companies manage change internally when implementing these AI workflows great question it's key to involve employees early on by designating AI Champions within teams businesses can bridge the gap between Tech and people making the transition smoother so what's the big takeaway for businesses considering custom chat GPT workflows the big takeaway is that custom chat GPT workflows aren't just about saving time they're about transforming operations at their core they help teams collaborate better innovate more and scale efficiently that's exciting it seems like the future of business automation is here absolutely and businesses that Embrace this tailored approach aren't just optimizing they're future proofing their operations in an aid driven Marketplace well I'm convinced time to reink how we use AI in our own processes definitely it's an opportunity we can't afford to miss
clean_brief.raw_text:
YouTube title: Boosting Business Productivity with Custom ChatGPT Workflows
Channel: Poll the People
Description: ChatGPT Will Change How You Run Your Business! Here's How to Automate Smarter! STOP Wasting Time on Manual Tasks!
Transcript:
today we're diving into how custom chat GPT workflows can uh revolutionize business operations let's get started that's fantastic so what's the main idea behind using chat GPT for streamlining business Ops well most businesses think automation is just about replacing human effort but it's actually about doing things smarter not just faster right so you're saying custom chat GPT workflows can make operations more efficient and intelligent exactly according to Accenture AI Technologies like chat GPT can boost productivity by up to 40% wow yet many companies struggle to unlock its full potential because they Overlook tailoring these tools to their unique needs that's interesting how can businesses move Beyond generic automation to create workflows that truly align with their goals it's about identifying bottlenecks in their processes and designing custom solutions by integrating chat GPT they can automate routine tasks like report generation ensuring faster decisions with better data yeah but isn't there a challenge in integrating chat GPT with existing systems well integration isn't just about apis it's about creating Synergy tools like zapia can help chat GPT interact with crms and analytics platforms making operations smarter and more cohesive I see can you give an example of a company that successfully implemented this sure a retail company used chat GPT to automate product descriptions achieving a 40% reduction in content creation time their marketing team for strategic work but wait isn't there a risk that overreliance on automation could you know replace human roles actually automation with chat GPT complements human roles by handling repetitive tasks it empowers teams to focus on creativity and Innovation rather than mundane work that makes sense what what about data security and compliance how do businesses ensure they're not compromising sensitive information data security is crucial businesses should use robust encryption Implement strict access controls and regularly update systems to address vulnerabilities compliance with regulations like gdpr is essential definitely important so how do companies manage change internally when implementing these AI workflows great question it's key to involve employees early on by designating AI Champions within teams businesses can bridge the gap between Tech and people making the transition smoother so what's the big takeaway for businesses considering custom chat GPT workflows the big takeaway is that custom chat GPT workflows aren't just about saving time they're about transforming operations at their core they help teams collaborate better innovate more and scale efficiently that's exciting it seems like the future of business automation is here absolutely and businesses that Embrace this tailored approach aren't just optimizing they're future proofing their operations in an aid driven Marketplace well I'm convinced time to reink how we use AI in our own processes definitely it's an opportunity we can't afford to miss

content_brief.problem: หลายทีมประชุมแล้วได้แค่สรุปสวย ๆ แต่ไม่มี owner, due date, risk หรือข้อความ follow-up ที่เอาไปส่งต่อได้
tips: วาง transcript หรือ notes หลังประชุม
ขอตาราง decision / owner / due date / risk
ให้ AI เขียน follow-up ส่งใน Slack หรือ LINE
ตรวจชื่อคน วันครบกำหนด และสิ่งที่ตัดสินใจ
เก็บ template นี้ไว้ใช้ทุกประชุม
content_brief.trend_angle: AI meeting workflow ที่ดีต้องเปลี่ยน transcript/notes เป็น decision, action, owner, due date และ risk ไม่ใช่แค่สรุปว่าใครพูดอะไร

generation_qa_checklist: Content-graphic match: every icon, diagram, UI mockup, and visual metaphor must directly support the exact Thai copy on that slide.
No hallucinated product claims: use only source facts, provided keywords, and GenLabs teaching interpretation; do not invent dates, metrics, features, dashboards, or partnerships.
Source-media discipline: if source images are provided, borrow only broad layout/mood/interaction cues; do not copy exact source text, UI, brand styling, or composition.
Thai readability: mobile-readable, natural Thai, no clipped words, no garbled characters, no typos, and no dense paragraphs.
Carousel coherence: slide order must tell one mini-story from hook to problem to why it matters to steps to CTA.
Public safety: no public external links, X handles, channel labels, creator names, or attribution text in generated images or caption; attribution stays internal in Airtable/manifest.

social_post.description:
👋 เหมาะกับใคร: คนเริ่มใช้ AI, เจ้าของร้าน, คนทำคอนเทนต์, ฟรีแลนซ์ หรือทีมเล็กที่อยากเอา AI ไปใช้กับงานจริง ไม่ใช่แค่ดูข่าวแล้วผ่านไป

💡 ไอเดียหลัก: หลายทีมประชุมแล้วได้แค่สรุปสวย ๆ แต่ไม่มี owner, due date, risk หรือข้อความ follow-up ที่เอาไปส่งต่อได้

📌 ทำไมควรเซฟโพสต์นี้: AI meeting workflow ที่ดีต้องเปลี่ยน transcript/notes เป็น decision, action, owner, due date และ risk ไม่ใช่แค่สรุปว่าใครพูดอะไร

✅ วิธีเอาไปใช้แบบง่าย ๆ:

1) ✨ วาง transcript หรือ notes หลังประชุม

2) ✨ ขอตาราง decision / owner / due date / risk

3) ✨ ให้ AI เขียน follow-up ส่งใน Slack หรือ LINE

4) ✨ ตรวจชื่อคน วันครบกำหนด และสิ่งที่ตัดสินใจ

🧪 ตัวอย่างการเริ่มวันนี้: เลือกงานเล็ก ๆ 1 งาน เช่น เขียนแคปชั่นสินค้า ทำรูปโปรโมต สรุปไอเดียคอนเทนต์ หรือวางแผนโพสต์ แล้วให้ AI ช่วยทำทีละขั้น

🧭 สูตรจำง่าย: เป้าหมายชัด → ให้บริบท → ขอขั้นตอน → ตรวจคำตอบ → เก็บเป็นเทมเพลตไว้ใช้ซ้ำ

🌱 ถ้าเป็นมือใหม่ อย่าเริ่มจากเครื่องมือเยอะ ให้เริ่มจากปัญหาจริง 1 อย่าง แล้วใช้ AI ช่วยลดเวลาหรือทำให้งานออกมาชัดขึ้น

🔖 เซฟโพสต์นี้ไว้เป็นเช็กลิสต์ แล้วลองทำตาม 1 รอบวันนี้ ถ้าทำได้ คุณจะเริ่มเห็นว่า AI ไม่ใช่เรื่องไกลตัว แต่เป็นผู้ช่วยทำงานประจำวันที่ใช้ได้จริง

🚀 ติดตาม GenLabs AI Learning สำหรับบทเรียน AI ภาษาไทยที่สั้น เข้าใจง่าย และเอาไปใช้กับงาน/ธุรกิจได้ทันที
social_post.title: ประชุมเสร็จ ให้ AI แปลงโน้ตเป็นงานจริงทันที #AIมือใหม่  เอาไปใช้กับงานจริงได้ทันที
